LONDON - WE ARE SITE SPECIFIC. LCLO CAN'T PERFORM OUTSIDE OF LONDON, OTHER ITS NOT LONGER THE LCLO (EG. THE ROBIDA COMMUNITY LAPTOP ORCHESTRA)

___________________

COMMUNITY - OUR FOCUS IS HOW WE BUILD COMMUNITY AROUND AND IN RELATION TO TECHNOLOGY. HOW THAT COMMUNITY SITS IN THE WIDER CONTEXT OF ITS SETTING. HOW WE TAKE UP SPACE.

___________________

LAPTOP - REALLY, THIS IS A STANDING FOR UBIQUITOUS MULTI-PURPOSE TECHNOLOGIES, BUT ALSO IT REPRESENTS THE MATERIAL. WE ARE INTERESTED IN THE LAPTOP HOLISTICALLY. ITS SOFTWARE BUT ALSO ITS HARDWARE. ITS OS BUT ALSO ITS SPEAKERS.

___________________

ORCHESTRA - PARTLY, ITS ALLUSIONS TO SOUND MARKING, BUT ALSO ITS RELATION TO THEATRE STAGING. WE TRY TO KEEP OFF THE STAGE, HOPING TO BLUR THE LINES OF PERFORMER AND PARTICIPANT. EVERYONE IS IN LCLO. NO-ONE IS IN LCLO.

___________________
